free_text: Detailed (p,alpha) reaction studies on the lighter
nuclei with the Florida State University tandem
Thin, evaporated target on Formvar or carbon backings.
The authors have used junction counters throughout;
for the detection of alpha particles, they were
chosen so as to have an effective thickness of the
order of the alpha-particle range, while protons
deposited only a small amount of energy.
Absolute cross-sections were obtained by comparing
scattering and reactions from a series of judiciously
chosen gases using a small gas cell.
